channel.title: random on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in random on Jonathan Ma

item.title: Randomness generation
item.description: While working on a prototype of a web app, I needed to generate random boolean (true-or-false) values. At first, I tried this: var x = Math.random()>0.5; Get this into a 2D array: var array = []; var 2DArray = []; for(var i=0; i<10; i++) { array.push(Math.random()>0.5); } for(var i=0; i<10; i++) { 2Darray.push(array); array[i] = Math.random()>0.5; } The above ended up in 10 identical subarrays in the 2D array. Not what I wanted.
